default_style: very intimate whispering, barely audible, slow with long pauses, like speaking directly into someone's ear as they fall asleep

settle.style: warm and gentle, reassuring, like someone sitting on the edge of the bed

drift.style: slower, softer, intimate, progressive relaxation voice, body scan

sinking.style: very slow, dreamy, hypnotic monotone, words dissolving

dissolve.style: barely above a whisper, minimal, fading, like a voice heard through deep water

sleep.style: the quietest whisper possible, each word barely formed, dissolving into silence
